902	        ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
903	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
904	      = (Y.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (K.orderIsoOfFin hK j : Fin r)))⁻¹ * Y := by
905	    have hmm : (imageMatrix d r J K hJ hK).map
906	          ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
907	            (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
908	        = (universalMinorInv d r J K hJ hK).map
909	            ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
910	              (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
911	          * ((universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
912	              (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
913	                (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))).map
914	                  ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
915	                    (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK))) := by
916	      rw [imageMatrix]; exact Matrix.map_mul

926	/-- **Cramer-inverse cocycle on the triple overlap (L1)** (`lem:gr_bundleCocycle_matrix`):
927	over the triple-overlap ring `S_I = R^I[1/(P^I_J P^I_K)]` the base-changed Cramer inverses of
928	the localised minors satisfy the multiplicative cocycle identity
929	`(X^J_K)⁻¹ (X^I_J)⁻¹ = (X^I_K)⁻¹`. This is the pure matrix-algebra core of (C2), independent
930	of any sheaf data. Project-local. -/
931	theorem bundleTransition_cocycle_matrix (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r))
932	    (hI : I.card = d) (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
933	    (universalMinorInv d r J K hJ hK).map
934	        ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
935	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
936	      * (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ).map
937	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
938	      = (universalMinorInv d r I K hI hK).map
939	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) := by
940	  -- Take the `I`-minor (columns indexed by `I`) of the image-matrix cocycle.
941	  have hcol := congrArg
942	    (fun M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) (Localization.Away
943	        (minorDet d r I J hI hJ * minorDet d r I K hI hK)) =>
944	      M.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)))
945	    (cocycle_imageMatrix_eq' d r I J K hI hJ hK)
946	  simp only at hcol
947	  -- LHS of `hcol` is `(X^I_K)⁻¹` over `S_I`.
948	  rw [Matrix.submatrix_map, imageMatrix_submatrix_I] at hcol
949	  -- RHS of `hcol`: push the `I`-minor through the outer map.
950	  rw [Matrix.submatrix_map] at hcol
951	  -- `imageMatrix J K = (X^J_K)⁻¹ * X^J`, so its `I`-minor splits off the inverse factor;
952	  -- the second factor is `X^J` (over `R^J[1/P^J_K]`) restricted to the `I`-columns.
953	  have hsplit : (imageMatrix d r J K hJ hK).submatrix id
954	        (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r))
955	      = universalMinorInv d r J K hJ hK *
956	        ((universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
957	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
958	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))).submatrix id
959	          (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)) := by
960	    rw [imageMatrix]; exact mul_submatrix_col' _ _ _
961	  rw [hsplit, Matrix.map_mul] at hcol
962	  -- The comp identity `θ_{I,J}` realises the cross-localisation map on `R^J`.
963	  have hχ : ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
964	        (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK))).comp
965	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
966	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
967	      = (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
968	          (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom := by
969	    rw [RingHom.comp_assoc, awayInclRight_comp_algebraMap, cocycleΘIJ]
970	    exact IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp _ _
971	  have e1 : (universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
972	        ((awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
973	          (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom)
974	      = (imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).map
975	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) := by
976	    rw [← map_map_eq_of_comp' (universalMatrix d r J hJ)
977	        (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom
978	        (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) _ rfl]
979	    congr 1
980	    exact universalMatrix_map_transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ
981	  -- The base change of `X^J|_I` over `θ_{I,J}` is `(X^I_J)⁻¹` over `S_I`.
982	  have hXJI : (((universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
983	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
984	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))).submatrix id
985	          (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r))).map
986	          ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
987	            (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
988	      = (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ).map
989	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) := by
990	    rw [Matrix.submatrix_map, map_map_eq_of_comp' _ _ _ _ hχ, ← Matrix.submatrix_map, e1,
991	      Matrix.submatrix_map, imageMatrix_submatrix_I]
992	  rw [hXJI] at hcol
993	  exact hcol.symm

995	/-! ### L3 transport: `scalarEnd`/`matrixEnd` naturality under pullback
996	
997	The substantive new infrastructure for (C2). The atom is `scalarEnd_pullback`: pulling back a
998	scalar endomorphism `scalarEnd a` along a scheme morphism `p` is, after the unit-pullback
999	comparison `pullbackObjUnitToUnit`, the scalar endomorphism of the base-changed function
1000	`p.appTop a`. Its proof transposes the naturality square under the pullback-pushforward
1001	adjunction to a `unit`-level identity, which holds by naturality of the comorphism `p.c`. -/
1002	
1003	/-- The reduced (transposed) form of the scalar-naturality atom: on the unit sheaf,
1004	multiplication by `a` followed by the comorphism `unitToPushforwardObjUnit` equals the
1005	comorphism followed by the pushforward of multiplication by `p.appTop a`. Project-local
1006	helper for `scalarEnd_pullback`. -/
1007	lemma unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm {T S : Scheme.{0}} (p : T ⟶ S) (a : Γ(S, ⊤)) :
1008	    scalarEnd a ≫ SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)
1009	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) ≫
1010	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a)) := by
1011	  apply ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).obj
1012	    (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)).unitHomEquiv.injective
1013	  refine PresheafOfModules.sections_ext _ _ (fun Y => ?_)
1014	  -- Both `.val Y` are nested applications (no morphism composite) up to defeq, since
1015	  -- `unitHomEquiv (f ≫ p) = sectionsMap p (unitHomEquiv f)` and `sectionsMap`/`unitHomEquiv`
1016	  -- are `rfl`/`sectionsMk`-defined; rewrite into that form via `change`.
1017	  change (SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)).val.app Y
1018	        ((scalarEnd a).val.app Y (1 : S.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj Y))
1019	      = ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).map
1020	            (scalarEnd ((Scheme.Hom.appTop p) a))).val.app Y
1021	        ((SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)).val.app Y
1022	          (1 : S.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj Y))
1023	  rw [scalarEnd_val_app_one, SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply,
1024	    SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply, map_one]
1025	  -- Goal: `φ.hom.app Y (a|_Y) = ((pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))).val.app Y 1`.
1026	  -- RHS reduces (defeq, the pushforward's `map`-application is `rfl` + `scalarEnd_val_app_one`)
1027	  -- to `T.ringCatSheaf.obj.map (homOfLE le_top).op (p.appTop a)`; LHS rewrites to the same by
1028	  -- naturality of the comorphism `(toRingCatSheafHom p).hom` at `(homOfLE le_top).op : op ⊤ ⟶ Y`.
1029	  have hnat := ConcreteCategory.congr_hom
1030	    ((Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p).hom.naturality (homOfLE (le_top : Y.unop ≤ ⊤)).op) a
1031	  rw [CategoryTheory.comp_apply, CategoryTheory.comp_apply] at hnat
1032	  rw [hnat]
1033	  -- The RHS pushforward (its `map`-application is `rfl` on sections) evaluates the
1034	  -- scalar endomorphism `scalarEnd (p.appTop a)` at `1` over the preimage open; both sides are
1035	  -- then `T.ringCatSheaf.obj.map (homOfLE le_top).op (p.appTop a)` (the `homOfLE`s agree by
1036	  -- proof irrelevance, the comorphism by `forget₂`-on-elements), so `scalarEnd_val_app_one` closes.
1037	  exact (scalarEnd_val_app_one ((Scheme.Hom.appTop p) a)
1038	    (Opposite.op ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map p.base).obj (Opposite.unop Y)))).symm
1039	
1040	/-- **ATOM: scalar endomorphism naturality under pullback** (`lem:gr_scalarEnd_pullback`).
1041	For `p : T ⟶ S` and `a ∈ Γ(S,⊤)`, pulling back the scalar endomorphism `scalarEnd a` is,
1042	after the unit-pullback comparison `q = pullbackObjUnitToUnit`, the scalar endomorphism of the
1043	base-changed function `p.appTop a`:
1044	`(pullback p).map (scalarEnd a) ≫ q = q ≫ scalarEnd (p.appTop a)`.
1045	Proved by transposing under the pullback-pushforward adjunction to
1046	`unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm`.
1047	Project-local — the single irreducible new claim underlying `matrixEnd_pullback`. -/
1048	lemma scalarEnd_pullback {T S : Scheme.{0}} (p : T ⟶ S) (a : Γ(S, ⊤)) :
1049	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (scalarEnd a) ≫
1050	        SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)
1051	      = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) ≫
1052	        scalarEnd (p.appTop a) := by
1053	  apply (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction p).homEquiv
1054	    (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf) (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf) |>.injective
1055	  -- `homEquiv_naturality_left` collapses the LHS transpose; the RHS transpose
1056	  -- (`homEquiv_naturality_right`) is supplied as a term because positional `rw` cannot match
1057	  -- the identical-printing `homEquiv` under the `X.Modules` diamond (memory
1058	  -- `grquot-functor-dropped-termmode`).
1059	  -- `hq` is the lemma `..._homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit` restated in the `Scheme.Modules`
1060	  -- adjunction form (defeq to the `SheafOfModules` form), so `rw`/`congrArg` match syntactically.
1061	  have hq : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction p).homEquiv
1062	        (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf) (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)
1063	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p))
1064	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) :=
1065	    SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit _
1066	  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left, hq]
1067	  refine (unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm p a).trans ?_
1068	  exact (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction p).homEquiv_naturality_right
1069	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p))
1070	        (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))).trans
1071	      (congrArg (· ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))) hq)).symm
1072	
1073	/-- The action of `matrixEnd M` on the `j`-th free injection: `ιFree j ≫ matrixEnd M`
1074	expands as the sum over rows `∑ k, scalarEnd (M k j) ≫ ιFree k`. Project-local helper
1075	for `matrixEnd_pullback`. -/
1076	lemma ιFree_matrixEnd {S : Scheme.{0}} {d : ℕ} (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤))
1077	    (j : Fin d) :
1078	    SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := S.ringCatSheaf) j ≫ matrixEnd M
1079	      = ∑ k, scalarEnd (M k j) ≫ SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := S.ringCatSheaf) k := by
1080	  rw [matrixEnd, SheafOfModules.ιFree]
1081	  simp only [SheafOfModules.free]
1082	  rw [Iso.symm_hom, biproduct.isoCoproduct_inv, biproduct.isoCoproduct_hom,
1083	    ← Category.assoc, Sigma.ι_desc, biproduct.ι_matrix_assoc, biproduct.lift_desc]
1084	  rfl
1085	
1086	/-- **(a) Matrix endomorphism naturality under pullback** (`lem:gr_matrixEnd_pullback`).
1087	For `p : T ⟶ S` and `M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S,⊤)`, the pullback of the matrix
1088	endomorphism `matrixEnd M` is, after the free-pullback comparison `Q = pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)`,
1089	the matrix endomorphism of the base-changed matrix `p.appTop • M` (entrywise comorphism):
1090	`(pullback p).map (matrixEnd M) = Q.hom ≫ matrixEnd (p.appTop.mapMatrix M) ≫ Q.inv`.
1091	Reduces, on each one-element biproduct component, to the scalar atom `scalarEnd_pullback`.
1092	Project-local. -/
1093	lemma matrixEnd_pullback {T S : Scheme.{0}} (p : T ⟶ S) {d : ℕ}
1094	    (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤)) :
1095	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (matrixEnd M)
1096	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom ≫
1097	        matrixEnd ((CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.Hom.appTop p)).mapMatrix M) ≫
1098	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).inv := by
1099	  haveI := Scheme.Modules.opensMap_final p
1100	  -- Reduce to the naturality square (cancel the trailing `Q.inv`).
1101	  rw [← Category.assoc, Iso.eq_comp_inv]
1102	  -- Check the two maps out of the coproduct `(pullback p).obj (free (Fin d))` agree on each
1103	  -- free injection `(pullback p).map (ιFree i)` (the cofan of the preserved colimit).
1104	  refine Cofan.IsColimit.hom_ext
1105	    (isColimitCofanMkObjOfIsColimit (Scheme.Modules.pullback p) _ _
1106	      (SheafOfModules.isColimitFreeCofan (Fin d))) _ _ (fun i => ?_)
1107	  simp only [cofan_mk_inj, Cofan.mk_pt]
1108	  -- `Q.hom` is, by construction of `pullbackFreeIso`, the Mathlib free-pullback comparison.
1109	  have hQhom : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom
1110	      = (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjFreeIso (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) (Fin d)).hom := rfl
1111	  -- The free injection cancels against `Q.hom` into the unit-pullback comparison
1112	  -- (`pullbackObjUnitToUnit`), which is where `scalarEnd_pullback` lives.
1113	  have key : ∀ k : Fin d,
1114	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree k)
1115	          ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom
1116	        = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)
1117	            ≫ SheafOfModules.ιFree k := by
1118	    intro k
1119	    rw [hQhom]
1120	    exact SheafOfModules.pullback_map_ιFree_comp_pullbackObjFreeIso_hom _ k
1121	  -- LHS: `map (ιFree i) ≫ map (matrixEnd M)` collapses to `map (ιFree i ≫ matrixEnd M)`,
1122	  -- then `ιFree_matrixEnd` turns it into a row sum, distributed by additivity of the pullback.
1123	  rw [← Category.assoc ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree i))
1124	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (matrixEnd M)),
1125	    ← Functor.map_comp]
1126	  -- `erw` (defeq matching) is needed to see `ιFree i ≫ matrixEnd M` under `(pullback p).map`.
1127	  erw [ιFree_matrixEnd M i]
1128	  erw [Functor.map_sum]
1129	  rw [Preadditive.sum_comp]
1130	  -- RHS: cancel `map (ιFree i) ≫ Q.hom` into `pullbackObjUnitToUnit ≫ ιFree i`, then expand.
1131	  rw [← Category.assoc ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree i))
1132	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom,
1133	    key i]
1134	  erw [Category.assoc]
1135	  erw [ιFree_matrixEnd ((CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.Hom.appTop p)).mapMatrix M) i]
1136	  erw [Preadditive.comp_sum]
1137	  -- Match term by term: each entry reduces to the scalar atom `scalarEnd_pullback`.
1138	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => ?_)
1139	  erw [Functor.map_comp]
1140	  rw [Category.assoc, key k]
1141	  erw [reassoc_of% scalarEnd_pullback p (M k i)]
1142	  erw [Category.assoc]

1144	/-- The action of `matrixEndRect M` on the `j`-th free injection: `ιFree j ≫ matrixEndRect M`

1146	for `matrixEndRect_pullback` (rectangular analogue of `ιFree_matrixEnd`). -/
1147	lemma ιFree_matrixEndRect {S : Scheme.{0}} {d r : ℕ} (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) Γ(S, ⊤))
1148	    (j : Fin r) :

1150	      = ∑ k, scalarEnd (M k j) ≫ SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := S.ringCatSheaf) k := by
1151	  rw [matrixEndRect, SheafOfModules.ιFree]
1152	  simp only [SheafOfModules.free]
1153	  rw [Iso.symm_hom, biproduct.isoCoproduct_inv, biproduct.isoCoproduct_hom,

1766	            (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i) (D.ι j)).hom.app
1767	              ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i)).obj (M j)))) ≫

1818	/-! ### Restriction of the glued sheaf to a chart (`def:gr_modules_glueRestrictionIso`)
1819	
1820	The glued sheaf is the descent equalizer `eq(a, b) ⊆ ∏ᵢ (ιᵢ)_* Mᵢ`. This section
1821	re-exposes the two legs of that equalizer as standalone declarations
1822	(`glueLegA`/`glueLegB`), records that `glue` *is* their equalizer (`glueIsoEqualizer`,
1823	definitional), and produces the canonical projection `glueProj i` of the glued sheaf
1824	onto the `i`-th pushforward factor together with its compatibility with `glueLift`.
1825	The adjoint transpose of `glueProj i` along the chart immersion `D.ι i` is the
1826	*restriction morphism* `glueRestrictionHom i : ιᵢ^* (glue …) ⟶ M i`; effective descent
1827	(consuming the cocycle hypotheses C1/C2) makes it an isomorphism — the restriction
1828	isomorphism `glueRestrictionIso` of `def:gr_modules_glueRestrictionIso`. The
1829	limit-preservation engine is `restrictFunctor`: pullback along an open immersion is
1830	naturally isomorphic to a site-level pushforward, which is a right adjoint, hence
1831	preserves the descent equalizer and the pushforward product. -/
1832	
1833	/-- `restrictFunctor f` along an open immersion is a right adjoint: it is a site-level
1834	pushforward of sheaves of modules, whose left adjoint (the site-level pullback) exists
1835	by the presheaf-pullback + sheafification construction. Project-local instance. -/
1836	instance restrictFunctor_isRightAdjoint {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : X ⟶ Y) [IsOpenImmersion f] :
1837	    (restrictFunctor f).IsRightAdjoint := by
1838	  delta restrictFunctor
1839	  -- bare `infer_instance` fails on the outer search; the explicit presheaf-pullback +
1840	  -- sheafification construction elaborates (its three instance hypotheses all resolve)
1841	  exact (SheafOfModules.PullbackConstruction.adjunction _).isRightAdjoint
1842	
1843	/-- `restrictFunctor f` along an open immersion preserves limits (it is a right
1844	adjoint). Project-local. -/
1845	noncomputable instance restrictFunctor_preservesLimits.{w, w'} {X Y : Scheme.{u}}
1846	    (f : X ⟶ Y) [IsOpenImmersion f] :
1847	    PreservesLimitsOfSize.{w, w'} (restrictFunctor f) :=
1848	  (Adjunction.ofIsRightAdjoint (restrictFunctor f)).rightAdjoint_preservesLimits
1849	
1850	/-- **Pullback of sheaves of modules along an open immersion preserves limits**: it is
1851	naturally isomorphic to `restrictFunctor f`, a site-level pushforward and right
1852	adjoint. This is the engine that lets the chart restriction commute with the descent
1853	equalizer. Project-local. -/
1854	instance pullback_preservesLimits_of_isOpenImmersion.{w, w'} {X Y : Scheme.{u}}
1855	    (f : X ⟶ Y) [IsOpenImmersion f] :
1856	    PreservesLimitsOfSize.{w, w'} (Scheme.Modules.pullback f) :=
1857	  preservesLimits_of_natIso (restrictFunctorIsoPullback f)
1858	
1859	section GlueRestriction
1860	
1861	-- NOTE: `glue`/`glueLift` elaborated universe-monomorphic at `Scheme.GlueData.{0}`
1862	-- (their universe was pinned during elaboration); the restriction layer follows suit.
1863	variable (D : Scheme.GlueData.{0}) (M : ∀ i, (D.U i).Modules)
1864	
1865	/-- The product of pushforwards `∏ᵢ (ιᵢ)_* Mᵢ` into which the glued sheaf embeds.
1866	Project-local helper re-exposing the `P` of `glue`. -/
1867	noncomputable def glueProd : D.glued.Modules :=
1868	  ∏ᶜ fun i => (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι i)).obj (M i)
1869	
1870	/-- The overlap product `∏_{(i,j)} (f_ij ≫ ιᵢ)_* (f_ij^* Mᵢ)` receiving the two descent
1871	legs. Project-local helper re-exposing the `Qfun`-product of `glue`. -/
1872	noncomputable def glueOverlapProd : D.glued.Modules :=
1873	  ∏ᶜ fun p : D.J × D.J =>
1874	    (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f p.1 p.2 ≫ D.ι p.1)).obj
1875	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1))
1876	
1877	/-- First descent leg (`a` of `glue`): on the `(i,j)`-component, restrict the `i`-th
1878	chart section to the overlap `V (i,j)` via the unit of the pullback–pushforward
1879	adjunction along `f_ij` and the pushforward-composition comparison. Project-local. -/
1880	noncomputable def glueLegA : glueProd D M ⟶ glueOverlapProd D M :=
1881	  Pi.lift fun p => Pi.π _ p.1 ≫
1882	    ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.1)).map
1883	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f p.1 p.2)).unit.app (M p.1)) ≫
1884	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f p.1 p.2) (D.ι p.1)).hom.app
1885	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))
1886	
1887	/-- Second descent leg (`b` of `glue`): on the `(i,j)`-component, restrict the `j`-th
1888	chart section, transport it across the transition isomorphism `g_ij`, and reindex the
1889	immersion via the glue condition. Project-local. -/
1890	noncomputable def glueLegB
1891	    (g : ∀ i j, (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i) ≅
1892	        (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i)).obj (M j)) :
1893	    glueProd D M ⟶ glueOverlapProd D M :=
1894	  Pi.lift fun p => Pi.π _ p.2 ≫
1895	    ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.2)).map
1896	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
1897	          (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).unit.app (M p.2)) ≫
1898	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) (D.ι p.2)).hom.app
1899	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).obj (M p.2)) ≫
1900	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforward
1901	        ((D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2)).map (g p.1 p.2).inv ≫
1902	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr
1903	        (show (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2 = D.f p.1 p.2 ≫ D.ι p.1 by
1904	          rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition p.1 p.2)).hom.app
1905	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))
1906	
1907	variable (g : ∀ i j, (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i) ≅
1908	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i)).obj (M j))
1909	  (hC1 : ∀ i, g i i = eqToIso (congrArg (fun φ => (Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj (M i))
1910	      (show D.f i i = D.t i i ≫ D.f i i by rw [D.t_id i, Category.id_comp])))
1911	  (hC2 : ∀ i j k,
1912	      pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.fst (D.f i j) (D.f i k))
1913	          (D.f i j) (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i) (g i j) ≪≫
1914	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_mid D i j k)).app (M j) ≪≫
1915	        pullbackBaseChangeTransport (D.t' i j k ≫ pullback.fst (D.f j k) (D.f j i))
1916	          (D.f j k) (D.t j k ≫ D.f k j) (g j k) ≪≫
1917	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_tgt D i j k)).app (M k)
1918	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_src D i j k)).app (M i) ≪≫
1919	        pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.snd (D.f i j) (D.f i k))
1920	          (D.f i k) (D.t i k ≫ D.f k i) (g i k))
1921	
1922	/-- The glued sheaf *is* the equalizer of the two (re-exposed) descent legs. The
1923	isomorphism is definitional (`Iso.refl`); it exists to let the equalizer API fire
1924	syntactically on `glue`. Project-local. -/
1925	noncomputable def glueIsoEqualizer :
1926	    glue D M g hC1 hC2 ≅ equalizer (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) :=
1927	  Iso.refl _
1928	
1929	/-- Projection of the glued sheaf onto the `i`-th pushforward factor `(ιᵢ)_* Mᵢ`:
1930	the equalizer inclusion followed by the product projection. Project-local. -/
1931	noncomputable def glueProj (i : D.J) :
1932	    glue D M g hC1 hC2 ⟶ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι i)).obj (M i) :=
1933	  (glueIsoEqualizer D M g hC1 hC2).hom ≫ equalizer.ι (glueLegA D M) (glueLegB D M g) ≫
1934	    Pi.π _ i
1935	
1936	/-- `glueLift` followed by the `i`-th projection recovers the `i`-th component of the
1937	lifted family. Project-local. -/
1938	@[reassoc]
1939	lemma glueLift_glueProj {W : D.glued.Modules}
1940	    (k : ∀ i, W ⟶ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι i)).obj (M i))
1941	    (hk : ∀ p : D.J × D.J,
1942	      k p.1 ≫
1943	          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.1)).map
1944	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f p.1 p.2)).unit.app (M p.1)) ≫
1945	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f p.1 p.2) (D.ι p.1)).hom.app
1946	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))
1947	        = k p.2 ≫
1948	          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.2)).map
1949	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
1950	              (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).unit.app (M p.2)) ≫
1951	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) (D.ι p.2)).hom.app
1952	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).obj (M p.2)) ≫
1953	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward
1954	            ((D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2)).map (g p.1 p.2).inv ≫
1955	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr
1956	            (show (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2 = D.f p.1 p.2 ≫ D.ι p.1 by
1957	              rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition p.1 p.2)).hom.app
1958	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))) (i : D.J) :
1959	    glueLift D M g hC1 hC2 k hk ≫ glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 i = k i := by
1960	  dsimp only [glueLift, glueProj, glueIsoEqualizer, Iso.refl_hom]
1961	  -- term-mode: the mixed-provenance comp nodes block positional `rw [Category.id_comp]`
1962	  exact (congrArg (equalizer.lift (Pi.lift k) _ ≫ ·) (Category.id_comp _)).trans
1963	    ((Category.assoc _ _ _).symm.trans
1964	      ((congrArg (· ≫ Pi.π _ i) (equalizer.lift_ι _ _)).trans (Limits.Pi.lift_π _ _)))
1965	
1966	/-- **The restriction morphism of the glued sheaf** to the `i`-th chart: the adjoint
1967	transpose, along the chart immersion `ιᵢ`, of the `i`-th projection `glueProj i`.
1968	Effective descent (`isIso_glueRestrictionHom`) makes it an isomorphism. Project-local. -/
1969	noncomputable def glueRestrictionHom (i : D.J) :
1970	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).obj (glue D M g hC1 hC2) ⟶ M i :=
1971	  ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.ι i)).homEquiv _ _).symm
1972	    (glueProj D M g hC1 hC2 i)
1973	
1974	/-- **The chart restriction of the glued sheaf is the equalizer of the restricted
1975	descent legs**: the chart pullback preserves the descent equalizer
1976	(`pullback_preservesLimits_of_isOpenImmersion`). First reduction step of
1977	`isIso_glueRestrictionHom`. Project-local. -/
1978	noncomputable def glueRestrictEqualizerIso (i : D.J) :
1979	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).obj (glue D M g hC1 hC2)
1980	      ≅ equalizer ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).map (glueLegA D M))
1981	          ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).map (glueLegB D M g)) :=
1982	  (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).mapIso (glueIsoEqualizer D M g hC1 hC2) ≪≫
1983	    PreservesEqualizer.iso (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)) _ _
1984	
1985	/-- **The chart restriction of the pushforward product is the product of the
1986	restrictions**: the chart pullback preserves the product
1987	(`pullback_preservesLimits_of_isOpenImmersion`). Second reduction step of
1988	`isIso_glueRestrictionHom`: the factors `ι_i^* ((ι_j)_* M_j)` are then identified with
1989	`(f_ij)_* ((t_ij ≫ f_ji)^* M_j)` by the overlap base change of the cartesian chart
1990	square (`glueData_preimage_image_eq`). Project-local. -/
1991	noncomputable def glueRestrictProdIso (i : D.J) :
1992	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).obj (glueProd D M)
1993	      ≅ ∏ᶜ fun j => (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).obj
1994	          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι j)).obj (M j)) :=
1995	  PreservesProduct.iso (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)) _
1996	
1997	/-- **Chart restriction of a lifted morphism**: pulling a `glueLift` back to the `i`-th
1998	chart and composing with the restriction morphism recovers the adjoint transpose of the
1999	`i`-th component of the lifted family. This is `glueLift_glueProj` transposed along the
2000	chart immersion; it is what identifies `ι_I^* (tautologicalQuotient)` with the chart
2001	quotient downstream. Project-local. -/
2002	lemma pullback_map_glueLift_glueRestrictionHom {W : D.glued.Modules}
2003	    (k : ∀ i, W ⟶ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι i)).obj (M i))
2004	    (hk : ∀ p : D.J × D.J,
2005	      k p.1 ≫
2006	          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.1)).map
2007	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f p.1 p.2)).unit.app (M p.1)) ≫
2008	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f p.1 p.2) (D.ι p.1)).hom.app
2009	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))
2010	        = k p.2 ≫
2011	          ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.2)).map
2012	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction
2013	              (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).unit.app (M p.2)) ≫
2014	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) (D.ι p.2)).hom.app
2015	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).obj (M p.2)) ≫
2016	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforward
2017	            ((D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2)).map (g p.1 p.2).inv ≫
2018	          (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr
2019	            (show (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2 = D.f p.1 p.2 ≫ D.ι p.1 by
2020	              rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition p.1 p.2)).hom.app
2021	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))) (i : D.J) :
2022	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.ι i)).map (glueLift D M g hC1 hC2 k hk) ≫
2023	        glueRestrictionHom D M g hC1 hC2 i
2024	      = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.ι i)).homEquiv _ _).symm (k i) := by
2025	  rw [glueRestrictionHom, ← Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left_symm,
2026	    glueLift_glueProj]
2027	
2028	end GlueRestriction
2029	
2030	/-- **Overlap-square opens identity**: for an open `V` of the `i`-th chart of a scheme
2031	glue datum, the preimage under `ι_j` of its image in the glued scheme coincides with
2032	the image, under the `j`-side overlap immersion `t_ij ≫ f_ji`, of its preimage under
2033	`f_ij`. This is the underlying-opens form of the cartesianness of the chart-overlap
2034	square (`vPullbackCone`); it is the site-level input identifying the two composite
2035	restriction functors of the overlap square. Project-local. -/
2036	lemma glueData_preimage_image_eq (D : Scheme.GlueData.{0}) (i j : D.J)
2037	    (V : (D.U i).Opens) :
2038	    (D.ι j) ⁻¹ᵁ ((D.ι i) ''ᵁ V) = (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i) ''ᵁ ((D.f i j) ⁻¹ᵁ V) := by
2039	  ext x
2040	  constructor
2041	  · intro hx
2042	    -- a point of `U_j` mapping into `ι_i(V)` comes from the overlap via the glue relation
2043	    obtain ⟨y, hyV, hyx⟩ := hx
2044	    obtain ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩ := (D.ι_eq_iff i j y x).mp hyx
2045	    exact ⟨w, show (D.f i j) w ∈ V from (show (D.f i j) w = y from hw1) ▸ hyV, hw2⟩
2046	  · rintro ⟨w, hwV, rfl⟩
2047	    refine ⟨D.f i j w, hwV, ?_⟩
2048	    -- `ι_i (f_ij w) = ι_j ((t_ij ≫ f_ji) w)`: the glue condition at the point `w`
2049	    have h := congrArg (fun m : D.V (i, j) ⟶ D.glued => m w)
2050	      ((D.glue_condition i j).symm.trans (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm)
2051	    exact h
2052	
2053	/-- **The two composite opens functors of the chart-overlap square are equal**: going

3055	/-! ## The functor of points and the universal property
3056	
3057	The Grassmannian functor sends a scheme `T` to the set of *equivalence classes* of
3058	rank-`d` quotients `q : O_T^r ↠ F` with `F` locally free of rank `d`. We encode a single
3059	such quotient as the structure `RankQuotient r d T`, the equivalence as `RankQuotient.Rel`
3060	(an isomorphism of the targets commuting with the quotient maps), and the functor's value
3061	at `T` as the quotient `Quotient (rqSetoid r d T)`. The pullback action `rqPullback`
3062	together with `pullbackFreeIso`/`pullback_isLocallyFreeOfRank` (and the fact that the
3063	pullback functor preserves epimorphisms, being a left adjoint) realise functoriality.
3064	
3065	Because a sheaf of modules `F : T.Modules` is a large object, this quotient lives in
3066	`Type 1` (not `Type 0` as the original scaffold signature stated); the corrected universe
3067	is the only change to the pinned signature, and it is forced — the substantive content is
3068	unchanged. -/
3069	
3070	/-- A **rank-`d` quotient of `O_T^r`** on a scheme `T`: a sheaf of modules `F` on `T`,
3071	locally free of rank `d`, together with an epimorphism `q : O_T^r ↠ F`. This is the
3072	unbundled datum whose equivalence classes form the value of the Grassmannian functor. -/
3073	structure RankQuotient (r d : ℕ) (T : Scheme.{0}) where
3074	  /-- The quotient sheaf. -/
3075	  F : T.Modules
3076	  /-- The quotient map out of the trivial rank-`r` bundle. -/
3077	  q : SheafOfModules.free (R := T.ringCatSheaf) (Fin r) ⟶ F
3078	  /-- The quotient map is an epimorphism (surjective). -/
3079	  epi : Epi q
3080	  /-- The quotient sheaf is locally free of rank `d`. -/
3081	  locFree : SheafOfModules.IsLocallyFreeOfRank F d
3082	
3083	/-- Two rank-`d` quotients are **equivalent** when there is an isomorphism of the targets
3084	commuting with the quotient maps (equivalently, when the kernels of the quotient maps
3085	coincide). -/
3086	def RankQuotient.Rel {r d : ℕ} {T : Scheme.{0}} (x y : RankQuotient r d T) : Prop :=
3087	  ∃ f : x.F ≅ y.F, x.q ≫ f.hom = y.q

open CategoryTheory Limits Opposite

with open('AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/GrassmannianQuot.lean', 'w') as f:

gq_lines = patched_content.split('\n')
